essential_assertions.text: assert(need + k - 1 == m * k + rem) by(nonlinear_arith) requires m == (need + k - 1) / k, rem == (need + k - 1) % k, k >= 1, ;
assert((m - 1) * k == need - 1 - rem) by(nonlinear_arith) requires m * k == need + k - 1 - rem, k >= 1, ;
assert(sufficient_notebooks(r as int, g as int, b as int, n as int, k as int));
